docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KENNAN, GILL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERMUDEZ, FRANK $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $69.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,069.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-02-2001, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO JAN-11-2001 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 I AM CURRENTLY IN FINALS WEEK AT SCHOOL & I WOULD TO CONCENTRATE ON MY STUDIES BEFORE PREPARING FOR THIS TRIAL.
